title: Spiced Lamb & Aubergine
intro: Sabrina Ghayour brought Persian flavours to everyone's table. This rich, spiced lamb and aubergine is fragrant with cinnamon and cumin — the Thermomix simmers it tender.
steps: Chop onion and garlic 4 sec / speed 5. Scrape.
Add oil and spices and sauté 3 min / 120°C / speed 1.
Add lamb and sear 5 min / 120°C / Reverse / speed 1.
Add aubergine, tomato paste, tomatoes and stock. Cook 30 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1, MC off and basket on the lid. Season and scatter with parsley.
tips: Cinnamon with lamb is the Persian signature — don't skip it.
Lovely over rice or with warm flatbread.

faq.q: Can I use beef instead of lamb?
faq.a: Yes — beef chuck works well; keep the slow simmer so it goes tender.

faq.q: Is this the original Sabrina Ghayour recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Sabrina Ghayour and spiced lamb & aubergine; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.

faq.q: Can I make this Spiced Lamb & Aubergine in a TM6 or TM7?
faq.a: Yes. The method is written with TM6 and TM7 settings, using metric weights, clear times, temperatures and speeds.

description: A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Sabrina Ghayour-style spiced lamb & aubergine: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks.
